metadata.title: binbox - digital music lab
metadata.description: binbox is a digital music lab blending 90s nostalgia with modern web audio experiments.

hero.title: binbox is a creative web audio studio for VHS fuzz, CRT glow, and PS1-era rhythm experiments.
hero.description: The project blends artist portfolio with an interactive lab. Explore new releases, build breakbeats, and step into a retro-future playground where code and music collide.

breakbeatLab.title: Breakbeat Lab
breakbeatLab.description: Patch together jungle rhythms and learn how the pattern engine works.

tapeArchive.title: Tape Archive
tapeArchive.description: Curated artifacts, scans, and audio memories from the digital underground.

samples.title: Samples
samples.description: Future sound packs, toolkits, and textures for nostalgic sound design.

mission.title: Analog soul, digital grit
mission.description: binbox documents a music practice built on breakbeat science, audio hacking, and the soft glow of outdated hardware. Every experiment and tutorial is designed to be open, tactile, and remixable.

items.webAudio: Building Web Audio instruments with Tone.js
items.streaming: Streaming new jungle and breakbeat sketches

lab.title: Lab
lab.description: Experiments, prototypes, and creative coding sketches live here. Each experiment has its own module so it can grow into a full instrument.

breakbeatGenerator.title: Breakbeat Generator
breakbeatGenerator.description: A Tone.js-powered 16-step pattern engine tuned for jungle energy.

breakSlicer.title: Break Slicer
breakSlicer.description: Slice a classic break into 16 parts and rearrange it live.

musicTheoryKeyboard.title: Music Theory Keyboard
musicTheoryKeyboard.description: Play chords, modes, and a circle of fifths with a responsive piano UI.

breakbeatGenerator.title: Playable Jungle Drum Machine
breakbeatGenerator.description: Build your own breakbeat with a 16-step sequencer, shuffle swing, and humanized timing. Toggle steps to sculpt the groove in real time.
breakbeatGenerator.grooveNote: Core groove: snare on steps 5 and 13, ghost kicks, fast hat fills, and shuffle tuned to 16th notes.

breakSlicer.title: Interactive Break Slicer
breakSlicer.description: Load a classic breakbeat and rearrange the slices into fresh jungle rhythms. Click a slice block to cycle its position, shift-click to go backwards.
breakSlicer.note: Tip: Adjust pitch per step for quick stutters and machine-gun fills.

music.title: Music
music.description: New releases, live sessions, and experimental mixes will live here. Expect cassette crunch, PS1 ambience, and breakbeat momentum.
music.placeholder: Drop in your latest EP embeds, playlist links, or streaming widgets. This section is ready for future expansion.

tutorials.description: Guides on Web Audio, retro sound design, and creative coding workflows.
tutorials.placeholder: Publish deep dives on Tone.js, sampler design, or breakbeat theory. This area is ready for longform content and series.

about.title: About
about.description: binbox is a digital studio exploring 90s-inspired sound, visual memory, and interactive music tools.

body.p1: I am a creator moving from frontend development into sound and digital art.
body.p2: Born in 1995, my work is shaped by the digital memory of the 90s — VHS textures, early internet aesthetics, video games, and electronic music played through portable devices.
body.p3: With a background in web development and audio interaction, I have worked on browser-based audio processing, waveform visualization, and voice-related systems. Over time, I began to treat code as an instrument.
body.p4: Through binbox, I am building a personal sound environment — using Web Audio to generate rhythms, slice breaks, and reshape samples directly in the browser.
body.p5: My music focuses on: House / Jungle / Breakbeat / Synth Pop.
body.p6: Rooted in both dance culture and memory.
body.p7: binbox is an evolving experiment, and part of my path toward becoming a musician.
